requirement_topic.en: SONELEC Grid Connection for BESS — 220/380 V 50 Hz State Grid, IEC 62933, Thermal Derating, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: SONELEC BESS并网——220/380 V 50 Hz国家电网、IEC 62933、热降额及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: SONELEC BESS併網——220/380 V 50 Hz國家電網、IEC 62933、熱降額及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: SONELEC is Comoros's state electricity monopoly responsible for generation, transmission, and distribution. All grid-connected BESS installations in Comoros — including utility-scale and behind-the-meter projects — require SONELEC technical review and grid-connection approval as part of the state-controlled energy sector approval process. Comoros's grid operates at 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) at 50 Hz — nominally the same voltage levels as China's grid, which simplifies PCS configuration compared with markets using 240/415 V or 60 Hz. However, PCS grid-protection parameters, frequency ride-through settings, reactive power requirements, and SCADA communication protocols must be confirmed against SONELEC's specific technical requirements before commissioning. BESS project specifications in Comoros are expected to reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards — IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems) — as technical prerequisites. A critical additional requirement specific to Comoros is evidence of battery thermal management and derating capability for extreme coastal ambient temperatures, routinely exceeding high-temperature in summer. No publicly accessible SONELEC technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from SONELEC.
summary.zh: SONELEC是科摩罗负责发电、输电和配电的国家电力垄断企业。科摩罗所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模和表后项目——均须作为国家管控能源领域审批流程的一部分，取得SONELEC技术审查和并网批准。科摩罗电网运行参数为220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）、50 Hz——名义上与中国电网电压等级相同，与采用240/415 V或60 Hz的市场相比，储能变流器配置更为简便。然而，储能变流器电网保护参数、频率穿越设定值、无功功率要求及SCADA通信协议，须在调试前对照SONELEC具体技术要求确认。科摩罗BESS项目规格预计将以IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准——IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）及IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）——作为技术前提。科摩罗特有的关键额外要求是极端沿海环境温度（夏季通常超过high-temperature）下电池热管理和降额能力的证据。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认SONELEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向SONELEC获取。
summary.zht: SONELEC是科摩羅負責發電、輸電和配電的國家電力壟斷企業。科摩羅所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模和表後項目——均須作為國家管控能源領域審批流程的一部分，取得SONELEC技術審查和併網批准。科摩羅電網運行參數為220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）、50 Hz——名義上與中國電網電壓等級相同，與採用240/415 V或60 Hz的市場相比，儲能變流器配置更為簡便。然而，儲能變流器電網保護參數、頻率穿越設定值、無功功率要求及SCADA通訊協議，須在調試前對照SONELEC具體技術要求確認。科摩羅BESS項目規格預計將以IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準——IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）及IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）——作為技術前提。科摩羅特有的關鍵額外要求是極端沿海環境溫度（夏季通常超過high-temperature）下電池熱管理和降額能力的證據。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認SONELEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向SONELEC獲取。

standards_or_laws: SONELEC — state electricity monopoly; grid-connection approval required for all grid-connected BESS in Comoros; specific BESS technical requirements must be obtained directly from SONELEC
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Comoros grid parameters: 220/380 V (single-phase 220 V, three-phase 380 V), 50 Hz — nominally same voltage as China grid
IEC 62619:2022 — cell/module safety standard also expected as prerequisite for project-level grid-connection review

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). China's BMS requirements are covered by GB/T 34131 (Technical Requirements of Battery Management System for Electric Energy Storage System). China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V — the same nominal voltage as Comoros's grid. This represents a favourable technical alignment: PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings configured for China's 220/380 V grid should not require re-parameterisation for Comoros's 220/380 V grid, subject to SONELEC's specific protection relay settings and grid code requirements. However, Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not transferable to SONELEC and do not satisfy SONELEC's project-specific grid-connection requirements.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国电池管理系统（BMS）要求由GB/T 34131（电力储能用电池管理系统技术要求）覆盖。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V——与科摩罗电网名义电压相同。这代表有利的技术对齐：针对中国220/380 V电网配置的储能变流器电压保护阈值和穿越参数，在符合SONELEC具体保护继电器设定值和电网规范要求的前提下，理论上无需为科摩罗220/380 V电网重新参数化。然而，中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不可转用于SONELEC，不满足SONELEC项目专属并网要求。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國電池管理系統（BMS）要求由GB/T 34131（電力儲能用電池管理系統技術要求）覆蓋。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V——與科摩羅電網名義電壓相同。這代表有利的技術對齊：針對中國220/380 V電網配置的儲能變流器電壓保護閾值和穿越參數，在符合SONELEC具體保護繼電器設定值和電網規範要求的前提下，理論上無需為科摩羅220/380 V電網重新參數化。然而，中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不可轉用於SONELEC，不滿足SONELEC項目專屬併網要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
GB/T 34131-2023 — 电力储能用电池管理系统技术要求 (Technical Requirements of Battery Management System for Electric Energy Storage System)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy SONELEC's grid-connection requirements. Key points: (a) voltage alignment — Comoros and China both use 220/380 V 50 Hz, which is technically favourable; PCS may not require voltage re-parameterisation, but SONELEC protection relay settings and reactive power requirements must be confirmed before commissioning; (b) extreme heat derating — Comoros's coastal climate with summer ambient temperatures routinely exceeding high-temperature requires battery capacity derating documentation, thermal management system validation (cooling performance at high ambient), and demonstration that BMS high-temperature protection settings are appropriate for local conditions; standard Chinese test conditions (typically 25 °C baseline) may not cover Comoros operating range; (c) IEC 62933 evidence — prepare test and design documentation per IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 where referenced in SONELEC or project-owner specifications, as GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) SCADA and communication — confirm the monitoring interface protocol required by SONELEC (IEC 61850, Modbus, DNP3, or project-specific); (e) engage SONELEC at the earliest project stage to obtain project-specific connection agreement technical requirements before equipment design is finalised.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足SONELEC并网要求。要点如下：（a）电压对齐——科摩罗和中国均使用220/380 V 50 Hz，技术上有利；储能变流器可能无需电压重新参数化，但SONELEC保护继电器设定值和无功功率要求须在调试前确认；（b）极端高温降额——科摩罗沿海气候夏季环境温度通常超过high-temperature，须提供电池容量降额文件、热管理系统验证（高环境温度下的冷却性能），并证明BMS高温保护设定值适合当地条件；中国标准测试条件（通常以25°C为基准）可能未涵盖科摩罗运行范围；（c）IEC 62933证据——若SONELEC或项目业主规格中引用IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2，须相应准备测试和设计文件，GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）SCADA和通信——确认SONELEC要求的监控接口协议（IEC 61850、Modbus、DNP3或项目专属规格）；（e）在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与SONELEC接触，获取项目专属并网协议技术要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足SONELEC併網要求。要點如下：（a）電壓對齊——科摩羅和中國均使用220/380 V 50 Hz，技術上有利；儲能變流器可能無需電壓重新參數化，但SONELEC保護繼電器設定值和無功功率要求須在調試前確認；（b）極端高溫降額——科摩羅沿海氣候夏季環境溫度通常超過high-temperature，須提供電池容量降額文件、熱管理系統驗證（高環境溫度下的冷卻性能），並證明BMS高溫保護設定值適合當地條件；中國標準測試條件（通常以25°C為基準）可能未涵蓋科摩羅運行範圍；（c）IEC 62933證據——若SONELEC或項目業主規格中引用IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2，須相應準備測試和設計文件，GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）SCADA和通訊——確認SONELEC要求的監控接口協議（IEC 61850、Modbus、DNP3或項目專屬規格）；（e）在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與SONELEC接觸，獲取項目專屬併網協議技術要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SONELEC grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Comoros; technical requirements are project-specific and must be obtained directly from SONELEC; thermal derating documentation is a critical project deliverable given extreme coastal climate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Comoros

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy SONELEC's grid-connection requirements. The 220/380 V 50 Hz voltage alignment with China is technically favourable, but PCS protection parameters and reactive power settings must be validated against SONELEC's specific grid code. Critically, battery thermal derating documentation for Comoros's extreme coastal climate (ambient regularly above high-temperature) is a project-critical deliverable that goes beyond standard Chinese test conditions. Engage SONELEC at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, thermal performance validation requirements, and SCADA communication protocol specifications before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足SONELEC并网要求。220/380 V 50 Hz电压与中国一致，技术上有利，但储能变流器保护参数和无功功率设定值须针对SONELEC具体电网规范验证。关键在于，科摩罗极端沿海气候（环境温度通常超过high-temperature）下的电池热降额文件是超出中国标准测试条件的项目关键交付物。在设备采购最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与SONELEC接触，确定并网协议技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据、热性能验证要求及SCADA通信协议规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足SONELEC併網要求。220/380 V 50 Hz電壓與中國一致，技術上有利，但儲能變流器保護參數和無功功率設定值須針對SONELEC具體電網規範驗證。關鍵在於，科摩羅極端沿海氣候（環境溫度通常超過high-temperature）下的電池熱降額文件是超出中國標準測試條件的項目關鍵交付物。在設備採購最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與SONELEC接觸，確定併網協議技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據、熱性能驗證要求及SCADA通訊協議規格。
